title: Antimony-containing Substances Group - Canada.ca
content:
## Antimony-containing Substances Group
- Antimony-containing Substances Group
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Public comments received on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Antimony-containing Substance Group

None planned at this time

Antimony potassium tartrate (APT)

Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol 154, No. 28 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment.  The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 152, No. 37.
